mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_invite_apply ( group_id, inviter_id, invitee_id, type, status, create_time, expire_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, #{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{expireTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM family_invite_apply WHERE invitee_id = #{userId} AND type = 'apply' ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT a.id as applyId, a.group_id as groupId, g.group_name as groupName, u_inviter.nickname as inviterNickname, a.type, a.status, a.remark, a.create_time as createTime, a.deal_time as dealTime, a.expire_time as expireTime FROM family_invite_apply a LEFT JOIN family_group g ON a.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN t_user u_inviter ON a.inviter_id = u_inviter.id WHERE a.invitee_id = #{userId} OR a.inviter_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id as applyId, a.group_id as groupId, u_invitee.nickname as userNickname, u_invitee.username as userName, a.status, a.remark, a.create_time as createTime FROM family_invite_apply a INNER JOIN t_user u_invitee ON a.invitee_id = u_invitee.id WHERE a.group_id = #{groupId} AND a.type = 'apply' AND a.status = 'pending' ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
